interventions.name: X2 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: program-design analyses that require classes, methods, algorithms, and quality criteria to be named together

interventions.name: X2 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: object-and-algorithm walkthroughs connecting method structure to bounded algorithmic intent

interventions.name: X2 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: implementation review prompts using specification, testing, and maintainability evidence explicitly

interventions.name: X2 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: paired AP CSA synthesis tasks that reapply the same integrated reasoning in a second program context
